SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION OF VICTORIA E. TOWNSEND IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO COMPEL TO PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN MARKETING SYSTEMS, INC.

DISCOVERY 301, PLAINTIFFS ROBERT WELLS, DIANA WELLS AND ESTATE OF CHRISTOPHER C. WELLS BY AND THROUGH ITS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST, ROBERT WELLS' MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT AMERICAN MARKETING SYSTEMS, INCORPORATED TO PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE IS GRANTED IN PART. DEFENDANT'S FURTHER RESPONSE TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION 8 IS ADEQUATE. AS TO REQUESTS 20, 22 AND 23, DEFENDANT MUST PREPARE A PRIVILEGED LOG SPECIFYING WHICH DOCUMENTS ARE BEING WITHHELD ON THE GROUNDS OF PRIVILEGE WITHIN 10 DAYS. DEFENDANT MUST ALSO PRODUCE, WITHIN 10 DAYS, ANY DOCUMENTS IDENTIFYING IN ITS FURTHER RESPONSES BUT NOT PRODUCED UNLESS THEY ARE BEING WITHHELD ON THE GROUNDS OF PRIVILEGED AND ARE IDENTIFIED IN THE LOG. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; NOT REPORTED. (301/EHG)

Off Calendar Nov-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFFS ROBERT WELLS, DIANA WELLS and ESTATE OF CHRISTOPHER C. WELLS by and through its successor in interest, ROBERT WELLS' Motion To Compel Defendant American Marketing Systems, Incorporated To Provide Further Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One is granted in part. Defendant's further response to request for production 8 is adequate. As to requests 20, 22 and 23, Defendant must prepare a privileged log specifying which documents are being withheld on the grounds of privilege within 10 days. Defendant must also produce, within 10 days, any documents identifying in its further responses but not produced unless they are being withheld on the grounds of privileged and are identified in the log. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Not reported = (301/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2010 Set For Trial On May-16-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-29-11 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 624
